pm.archetypeName: +C Mixed — Post-Acquisition Dislocation (C: $274M goodwill impairment event) + Hidden Franchise Recovery (A: SDC/CS segments intact, insider buying at lows)

flex.name: Insider Conviction
flex.rationale: 3 directors $452K coordinated same-day buying; 32-70% position increases

flex.name: Coverage Gap
flex.rationale: 2-3 analysts, $453M mcap; thin but not zero

universal.name: Mispricing Assessment
universal.rationale: 30-75% upside; multi-legged but each requires execution; residual CG risk

universal.name: Repricing Mechanism
universal.rationale: Quarterly margin expansion + mechanical deleveraging; no hard catalyst

universal.name: Business Quality
universal.rationale: NOT monopoly (8-12% share); strong switching costs from FDA validation; 62.6% GM; CG drag

universal.name: Balance Sheet (GATE)
universal.rationale: Net debt $146M, 2.62x leverage declining; FCF covers debt; not fortress but manageable
